name: @openstellar/mcp-adapter
description: OpenCode plugin that improves MCP compatibility with Gemini and enables tool hook interception
author: OpenStellar

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && rollup -c rollup.dts.config.mjs && node scripts/prune-dist-declarations.mjs && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --packages=external --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --define:PACKAGE_VERSION="\"$npm_package_version\""
